final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic aerial photograph, ultra-wide landscape
Primary request: aerial drone long-exposure shot of a futuristic metropolis at night, cyberpunk color grading
Scene/backdrop: modern international CBD with countless skyscrapers, elevated highways with light trails, distant harbor with giant cruise ships docked, neon billboards illuminating the sky
Subject: iconic supertall skyscraper at center with sweeping searchlights from its roof piercing the night sky
Style/medium: drone aerial photography, long exposure, cinematic still
Composition/framing: high-angle bird's-eye view, ultra-wide establishing shot
Lighting/mood: dramatic high-contrast night lighting, searchlights cutting through darkness, immersive cyberpunk atmosphere
Color palette: dominant blue-violet tones, cyan and magenta neon accents, warm red/white light trails, deep blacks
Materials/textures: reflective glass curtain walls, smooth asphalt highways, metallic ship hulls, glowing neon surfaces
Constraints: keep the central supertall building as focal point, preserve light trail motion blur, maintain cyberpunk aesthetic
Avoid: oversaturated colors, cartoonish neon, deformed buildings, watermark, daytime lighting
